title: isocoma scopulorum
intro: Isocoma scopulorum, also known as the Scouler's isocoma or mountain balm, is a flowering plant species in the aster family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include soothing sore throats, calming digestive issues, and reducing fever. Isocoma scopulorum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
